title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nestle India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Nestle India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Nestle India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nestle India:
Nestle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
